Test scripts for boolean variable assertions and comparisons.


## Files
- **[08.03-001.js](08.03-001.js.md)**: A test script that asserts the truthiness of a boolean variable.
- **[08.03-002.js](08.03-002.js.md)**: A test script that asserts the negation of a boolean variable is true.
- **[08.03-003.js](08.03-003.js.md)**: A test script that asserts false is not equal to true.
